customers.title: Mirror Customers
customers.description: Shows Netsis/ERP customer records in a paged read-only view. Use it to verify the source data consumed by sync jobs.
customers.searchPlaceholder: Search by customer code, name, phone, city or tax number...

stocks.title: Mirror Stocks
stocks.description: Shows Netsis/ERP stock cards in a paged read-only view. Use it to verify product code, name, unit and group fields synced into Aqua.
stocks.searchPlaceholder: Search by stock code, name, group or producer code...

warehouses.title: Mirror Warehouses
warehouses.description: Shows Netsis/ERP warehouse definitions in a paged read-only view. Use these warehouse codes while mapping cages to ERP warehouses.
warehouses.searchPlaceholder: Search by warehouse code, name, customer code or branch...

branches.title: Mirror Branches
branches.description: Shows Netsis/ERP branches in a paged read-only view. Use it to verify branch codes used by headers and sync operations.
branches.searchPlaceholder: Search by branch code or title...

receiptShipmentMovements.title: ERP Goods Receipt/Shipment Movements
receiptShipmentMovements.description: Shows ERP goods receipt and shipment movements read from the FN source together with Aqua matching and processing status.
receiptShipmentMovements.searchPlaceholder: Search by document no, project, warehouse, stock, operation type or error...
